Metadata: main.members { state-column: status; initial-state: pending; states: pending,active,inactive,deceased; transitions: pending->active[officer,admin]@member.activated|active->inactive[officer,admin]@member.inactivated|inactive->active[admin]@member.reactivated|active->deceased[officer,admin]@member.deceased|inactive->deceased[officer,admin]@member.deceased }

main.events { state-column: status; initial-state: draft; states: draft,published,cancelled; transitions: draft->published[event_manager,admin]@event.published|published->cancelled[event_manager,admin]@event.cancelled|draft->cancelled[event_manager,admin]@event.cancelled }
